import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/types";

export const materialTheme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#546e7a",
    focusColor: "#c792ea",
    style: "round",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#89ddff",
    accentForeground: "#263238",
    background: "#263238",
    border: "#546e7a",
    error: "#f07178",
    errorForeground: "#263238",
    focusRing: "#c792ea",
    foreground: "#eeffff",
    info: "#ffcb6b",
    infoForeground: "#263238",
    muted: "#1a2327",
    mutedForeground: "#546e7a",
    primary: "#82aaff",
    primaryForeground: "#263238",
    secondary: "#37474f",
    secondaryForeground: "#eeffff",
    selection: "#82aaff",
    selectionForeground: "#263238",
    success: "#c3e88d",
    successForeground: "#263238",
    warning: "#ffcb6b",
    warningForeground: "#263238",
  },
  name: "material",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};
